unitName: LED Lights, LED/LCD TV and CCTV
topicName: TV Remote Control - IR Transmitter/Receiver, IR vs RF, Parts & Faults

questions.question: IR (Infrared) remote control mein transmitter section ka basic working principle kya hai?
options: Key press hone par encoder IC us key ke liye unique digital pulse code generate karta hai jise IR LED modulated infrared light ke roop mein emit karta hai
Transmitter seedhe radio waves generate karke TV tak bhejta hai bina kisi encoding ke
Transmitter mein ek microphone hota hai jo voice command ko IR signal mein badal deta hai
Transmitter TV ke power supply ko direct wire ke through control karta hai
questions.explanation: IR remote mein key press hote hi encoder IC us key ka corresponding unique pulse pattern generate karta hai jo IR LED ke through modulated infrared light ke roop mein transmit hota hai, isliye option A सही है। Option B RF remote ka principle है (radio waves), option C basic IR remote में मौजूद नहीं होता, और option D गलत है क्योंकि remote wireless device है, कोई direct wire connection TV से नहीं होता।

questions.question: IR remote mein carrier frequency (commonly approx 38kHz) ka use kis liye kiya jata hai?
options: IR LED ki brightness ko bढ़ाने ke liye
Taaki IR receiver ambient light/sunlight jaisi random infrared noise se actual remote signal ko alag pehchan sake
Battery life ko direct रूप से बढ़ाने के लिए
Remote ki wireless range ko control karne ke liye frequency adjust karke
questions.explanation: Data ko एक fixed carrier frequency (जैसे 38kHz) पर modulate किया जाता है ताकि receiver केवल उसी frequency के signal को valid माने और sunlight/ambient IR noise को ignore कर सके, इसलिए option B सही है। Brightness modulation से नहीं बढ़ती, carrier frequency का battery life पर सीधा effect नहीं है, और range frequency से नहीं बल्कि LED power/receiver sensitivity से तय होती है।

questions.question: TV mein IR receiver module ka sensing element commonly kya hota hai?
options: Thermocouple
LDR (Light Dependent Resistor) jo सिर्फ visible light detect करता है
Photodiode ya phototransistor jo infrared wavelength ke prati sensitive hota hai
Piezoelectric crystal
questions.explanation: TV ke IR receiver module में एक IR-sensitive photodiode ya phototransistor होता है जो remote की infrared light को detect करके electrical signal में बदलता है, इसलिए option C सही है। Thermocouple heat/temperature sense करता है, LDR visible light के लिए है, और piezoelectric crystal vibration/pressure sense करता है — ये IR sensing के लिए उपयुक्त नहीं हैं।

questions.question: IR remote control system ki sabse badi limitation kya hai jab ise RF remote se compare karte hain?
options: IR remote generally RF se jyada costly hota hai
IR remote ka range RF remote se lamba hota hai
IR remote walls/obstruction ke through easily kaam karta hai
IR ko kaam karne ke liye line-of-sight chahiye, aur ye kisi obstruction/wall ke through signal nahi bhej sakta
questions.explanation: IR signal light ki tarah straight-line mein travel karta hai isliye transmitter aur receiver ke beech clear line-of-sight zaroori hai, wall ya obstruction hone par signal block ho jata hai — isliye option D सही है। IR remote generally RF se sasta hota hai, iska range kam hota hai, aur ye obstruction ke through kaam nahi karta — बाकी तीनों statements गलत हैं।

questions.question: RF (Radio Frequency) remote control IR remote se kis prakar different hota hai?
options: RF remote radio waves use karta hai jinhe line-of-sight ki zaroorat nahi hoti aur ye walls/obstruction ke through bhi kaam kar sakta hai
RF remote sirf infrared light use karta hai lekin jyada intensity ke saath
RF remote ko bhi IR jaisa hi strict line-of-sight chahiye hota hai
RF remote battery ke bina hi operate ho jata hai
questions.explanation: RF remote radio waves use karta hai jo obstacles/walls ke through penetrate kar sakti hain aur line-of-sight ki zaroorat nahi padti, isliye option A सही है। Option B galat hai kyunki RF infrared light use nahi karta, option C IR ka characteristic hai na ki RF ka, aur option D galat hai kyunki RF remote ko bhi battery se hi power milta hai.

questions.question: Smart TV ke saath aane wale Bluetooth-based voice remote commonly kis technology par based hote hain?
options: Pure infrared (IR) modulation par
RF (radio frequency) technology par, jisme Bluetooth ek prakar ka RF communication hai
Sirf mechanical switch signal par bina kisi wireless transmission ke
Ultrasonic sound waves par
questions.explanation: Bluetooth remote radio waves ke ek standardized RF protocol par kaam karte hain, jisse walls/obstruction ke through bhi communication possible hoti hai aur line-of-sight ki zaroorat nahi rehti, isliye option B सही है। Ye pure IR modulation nahi hai, mechanical signal bina wireless transmission ke kaam nahi karega, aur ultrasonic sound remote control mein commonly use nahi hoti।

questions.question: IR remote aur RF remote ki cost/complexity compare karne par kaunsa statement sahi hai?
options: IR remote generally RF remote se jyada complex aur costly hota hai
Dono types ki cost aur complexity hamesha exactly same hoti hai
RF remote generally IR se jyada complex circuitry (transceiver, pairing logic) ke karan costly hota hai
RF remote mein koi electronic circuit hota hi nahi
questions.explanation: RF remote ko radio transceiver, antenna aur pairing/encoding circuitry chahiye hoti hai jo simple IR LED-photodiode setup se zyada complex aur costly hoti hai, isliye option C सही है। IR remote actually RF se saral aur sasta hota hai, dono ki cost same nahi hoti, aur RF remote mein bhi poora electronic circuit maujood hota hai।

questions.question: Ek basic remote control ki keypad section mein commonly kya hota hai?
options: Ek single rotary potentiometer
Ek microphone array voice detection ke liye
Ek LCD display driver circuit
Tact switches ki ek matrix jisme rows aur columns ka scan karke key-press encoder IC tak bheja jata hai
questions.explanation: Remote ki keypad mein chhote-chhote tact switches ek matrix (rows aur columns) mein arranged hote hain, jinhe encoder IC scan karke pehchanta hai ki kaunsi key dabai gayi, isliye option D सही है। Potentiometer, microphone array, ya LCD driver basic IR remote ke standard components nahi hain।

questions.question: Remote control ke andar carrier frequency generate karne ke liye commonly kis component ka use hota hai?
options: Ek ceramic resonator ya crystal jo encoder IC ke oscillator ko stable frequency reference provide karta hai jisse carrier (jaise approx 38kHz) accurately generate hota hai
Ek step-down transformer
Ek akela electrolytic capacitor
Ek small DC motor
questions.explanation: Encoder IC ke andar internal oscillator ko stable carrier frequency dene ke liye ek ceramic resonator ya crystal use hota hai, isliye option A सही है। Transformer voltage step-down/up ke liye hai, akela capacitor frequency reference nahi de sakta, aur DC motor to mechanical device hai, inka carrier frequency generation se koi lena-dena nahi hai।

questions.question: Remote control mein IR LED ko drive karne ke liye commonly kis component ka use hota hai?
options: Ek relay
Ek driver transistor jo encoder IC ke output pulses ko amplify karke IR LED ko sufficient current supply karta hai
Ek voltage regulator IC jaise 7805
Ek triac
questions.explanation: Encoder IC ka output current directly IR LED ko strongly drive karne ke liye kaafi nahi hota, isliye ek driver transistor use hota hai jo pulses ko amplify karke LED ko proper current deta hai, isliye option B सही है। Relay mechanical switching ke liye hai, 7805 fixed DC voltage regulate karta hai, aur triac AC power control mein use hota hai — ye teeno IR LED driving ke liye standard component nahi hain।

questions.question: TV remote control mein typically kis type ki battery aur approx voltage use hoti hai?
options: Ek single 12V battery
Hamesha ek rechargeable Li-ion 3.7V battery
Do 1.5V cells (AA/AAA) series mein jinse approx 3V supply milta hai
TV ke main supply se direct wire connection
questions.explanation: Zyadatar TV remotes mein do 1.5V AA/AAA cells series mein lage hote hain jinse approx 3V milta hai jo encoder IC aur IR LED chalane ke liye kaafi hota hai, isliye option C सही है। 12V battery ka use nahi hota, remote hamesha rechargeable Li-ion nahi hote (usually replaceable dry cells), aur remote wireless hone ki wajah se TV ke supply se direct wire se connected nahi hota।

questions.question: Agar remote control TV ko response nahi de raha ho, to sabse pehla aur sabse common check kya karna chahiye?
options: Encoder IC replace karna
Crystal ya ceramic resonator change karna
TV ka main circuit board check karna
Battery ki charge aur polarity check karna, kyunki weak ya dead battery sabse common fault hai
questions.explanation: Remote fail hone ka sabse common aur simple karan weak/dead battery ya galat polarity hota hai, isliye troubleshooting ki shuruaat option D se karni chahiye। Encoder IC ya crystal replace karna aur TV ka main board check karna advanced steps hain jo battery check karne ke baad hi kiye jate hain jab basic cause exclude ho jaye।

questions.question: Remote ki IR LED burnt/damaged hai ya nahi, ye check karne ka ek common practical tarika kya hai?
options: Mobile phone ke camera se remote ki IR LED ki taraf dekhte hue koi button dabana — agar LED sahi hai to camera screen par ek jhilmilata white/purple glow dikhta hai
Remote ko paani mein daal kar dekhna ki LED chalti hai ya nahi
LED ko directly 230V AC supply se connect karke test karna
Remote ko heat karke dekhna ki LED garam hoti hai ya nahi
questions.explanation: Mobile camera sensor infrared light ko capture kar sakta hai isliye remote ki IR LED ka test karne ke liye button dabakar camera se dekhna ek safe aur common practical method hai, agar glow dikhe to LED theek hai — isliye option A सही है। Paani mein daalna LED aur circuit ko damage kar sakta hai, 230V AC directly LED ko turant jala dega, aur heating se koi valid test nahi hota — ये सभी असुरक्षित/गलत तरीके हैं।

questions.question: Mobile camera se IR LED test karte samay glow dikhna sambhav hota hai kyunki?
options: IR light itni high intensity hoti hai ki human eye ko bhi normally dikhti hai
Mobile camera sensor infrared wavelength ke prati bhi sensitive hota hai (jabki human eye IR nahi dekh sakti), isliye ye glow ke roop mein capture ho jata hai
Mobile camera IR ko special filter se visible red light mein convert kar deta hai
Remote transmit karte samay khud visible light bhi produce karta hai
questions.explanation: Camera ka image sensor (CMOS) infrared range ke kuch hisse ke prati bhi sensitive hota hai jabki human eye sirf visible spectrum dekh sakti hai, isliye IR LED ka signal camera screen par glow ke roop mein dikh jata hai — option B सही है। IR light naked eye ko normally invisible hoti hai, camera koi special conversion filter nahi lagata, aur remote khud visible light produce nahi karta।

questions.question: Remote ke tact switches (buttons) oxidise ya dirty ho jaane par kaisa symptom common taur par dikhta hai?
options: Remote ka poora circuit short ho jata hai
Sabhi buttons ek saath permanently ON reh jate hain
Kuch particular buttons dabane par response inconsistent ya bilkul nahi milta jabki baaki buttons theek kaam karte hain
Remote ki battery achanak jaldi khatam hone lagti hai
questions.explanation: Tact switch contacts par oxidation ya dust jam jaane se sirf usी particular button ka electrical contact kamzor ho jata hai, jisse wo button kabhi kaam karta hai kabhi nahi, jabki baaki buttons normal rehte hain — isliye option C सही है। Iske karan circuit short nahi hota, sabhi buttons permanently ON nahi hote, aur battery drain se iska koi direct sambandh nahi hai।

questions.question: TV ke front panel par laga IR sensor window agar dust ya kisi object se blocked ho jaye to kya hoga?
options: TV apne aap band ho jayega
Remote ki battery jaldi drain hone lagegi
Sirf volume control buttons kaam karna band karenge
TV remote ke kisi bhi button ka response nahi dega, kyunki IR signal receiver tak pahunch hi nahi payega
questions.explanation: Agar IR sensor window blocked ho jaye to remote se bheja gaya IR signal receiver tak pahunch hi nahi payega, isliye TV kisi bhi command ka response nahi dega — option D सही है। TV apne aap band nahi hoga, remote ki battery is se drain nahi hoti, aur sirf ek button ka effect nahi hoga balki sabhi buttons affected hote hain kyunki sabhi ek hi IR path use karte hain।

questions.question: Ek technician mobile camera se confirm karta hai ki remote ki IR LED theek glow kar rahi hai, phir bhi TV ke andar laga IR receiver IC faulty ho to symptom kya hoga?
options: TV remote ke kisi bhi button ka response nahi dega, chahe remote sahi tarike se IR signal bhej raha ho
Sirf ek button kaam nahi karega, baaki sab normal rahenge
TV ki picture quality kharab ho jayegi
Remote ki wireless range achanak badh jayegi
questions.explanation: Chahe transmitter (remote) sahi kaam kar raha ho, agar TV ka IR receiver IC faulty hai to wo aane wale signal ko decode hi nahi kar payega, isliye TV kisi bhi command ka response nahi dega — option A सही है। Ye problem sirf ek button tak seemित nahi rehti, TV ki picture quality (video processing) se iska seedha sambandh nahi hai, aur faulty receiver se range badhna technically galat hai।

questions.question: Remote control mein encoder IC fault hone par kaunsa symptom common taur par dekha jata hai?
options: Remote ki battery life double ho jati hai
Remote galat code transmit karta hai ya bilkul code generate nahi karta, jisse TV wrong command follow kare ya koi response na de
IR LED bina kisi button dabaye permanently ON reh jati hai normal operation mein
Remote ka range automatically badh jata hai
questions.explanation: Encoder IC hi key press ke corresponding sahi digital code banata hai; iske faulty hone par galat code ban sakta hai ya koi code generate hi nahi hota, jisse TV wrong action kare ya kuch bhi na kare — isliye option B सही है। Battery life encoder fault se badhती nahi, normal working mein LED continuously ON nahi rehti, aur range fault se badhने ka koi technical aadhaar nahi hai।

questions.question: "Universal remote" ya "learning remote" ka concept kya hai?
options: Ye remote sirf ek hi TV brand ke liye kaam karta hai
Ye remote bina battery ke sirf solar power se chalta hai
Ye remote multiple devices (jaise TV, DVD player, set-top box) ke IR codes ko store/learn karke ek hi remote se sabko control kar sakta hai
Ye remote sirf RF signal use karta hai, IR bilkul nahi
questions.explanation: Universal ya learning remote alag-alag devices ke IR command codes ko internal memory mein store/learn kar leta hai, jisse ek hi remote se multiple brands/devices control ho sakte hain, isliye option C सही है। Ye single brand tak seemित nahi hota, generally standard battery use karta hai (solar nahi), aur commonly IR technology par hi based hota hai, sirf RF par nahi।

questions.question: IR aur RF remote control ki obstruction (jaise deewar) ke through kaam karne ki capability compare karne par sahi statement kaunsa hai?
options: Dono technologies equally deewar ke through kaam karti hain
IR remote deewar ke through sabse behtar kaam karta hai
RF remote ko bhi obstruction se utna hi block kiya ja sakta hai jitna IR remote ko
RF remote ki radio waves obstruction ko significant had tak penetrate kar sakti hain jabki IR remote ka signal solid obstruction se easily block ho jata hai
questions.explanation: Radio waves apni physical properties ki wajah se solid obstacles ke through kaafi hadd tak penetrate kar sakti hain, jabki infrared light straight-line travel karti hai aur wall jaise obstruction se turant block ho jati hai — isliye option D सही है। IR aur RF ki capability equal nahi hai, IR deewar ke through kaam nahi karta, aur RF IR jitna easily block nahi hota।

questions.question: Ek IR remote ka carrier frequency approx 38kHz hai. Iska time period (T) approx kitna hoga?
options: Approx 26.3 microseconds (T = 1/f = 1/38000 ≈ 26.3 µs)
Approx 38 milliseconds
Approx 2.6 seconds
Approx 380 microseconds
questions.explanation: Time period T = 1/frequency = 1/38000 Hz ≈ 26.3 microseconds, isliye option A सही है। 38 milliseconds बहुत बड़ा मान है (ये लगभग 26.3 Hz ka time period hota), 2.6 seconds to bilkul galat scale hai, aur 380 microseconds galat calculation ka result hai (dus guna galat)।

questions.question: IR technology wale remote control ka typical operating range kitna hota hai?
options: Sainkdo meter tak, deewar ke through bhi
Approx 5 se 10 meter tak, aur wo bhi sirf line-of-sight ke andar
Unlimited range, kabhi bhi kahin se bhi
1 cm se bhi kam, physical contact zaroori
questions.explanation: IR remote generally approx 5-10 meter ke range mein kaam karta hai, aur wo bhi sirf tab jab transmitter aur receiver ke beech clear line-of-sight ho — isliye option B सही है। Sainkdo meter ka range ya deewar ke through kaam karna IR ki characteristic nahi hai (ye RF ke liye zyada sahi hai), unlimited range ek anrealistic claim hai, aur physical contact ki zaroorat wireless IR remote mein bilkul nahi hoti।

questions.question: Remote control mein oscillator/ceramic resonator ka role IR transmission mein kya hota hai?
options: Keypad ko electrical power dena
IR LED ko sirf mechanical support dena
Encoder IC ko ek stable reference frequency provide karna jisse carrier frequency (jaise approx 38kHz) accurately generate ho sake
Battery ke output voltage ko regulate karna
questions.explanation: Ceramic resonator/oscillator encoder IC ko ek stable timing reference deta hai jisse IC accurately carrier frequency generate kar paata hai jis par data modulate hota hai — isliye option C सही है। Ye keypad ko power nahi deta, LED ke liye ye koi mechanical support nahi hai, aur voltage regulation ka kaam ye component nahi karta।

questions.question: RF remote control mein IR remote ke muqable additional circuitry ki zarurat kyun padti hai?
options: Kyunki RF technology mein IR se kam range milti hai
Kyunki RF signal ko bhi IR jaisa hi simple LED se transmit kiya ja sakta hai
Kyunki RF remote ko battery ki koi zarurat nahi hoti
Kyunki RF transmission ke liye RF transmitter/receiver module, antenna aur pairing/encoding circuitry chahiye jo IR ke simple LED-photodiode setup se zyada complex hai
questions.explanation: RF communication ke liye dedicated RF transceiver chip, antenna aur device pairing/encoding logic zaroori hoti hai jo basic IR ke LED-photodiode setup se kaafi zyada complex hoti hai, isliye option D सही है। RF range IR se generally jyada hoti hai (kam nahi), RF signal simple visible/IR LED se transmit nahi hota, aur RF remote ko bhi normal battery ki hi zaroorat hoti hai।

questions.question: Ek technician remote check karta hai — battery replace kar chuka hai, mobile camera se IR LED ka glow bhi confirm ho chuka hai, aur sabhi tact switches theek kaam kar rahe hain, phir bhi TV response nahi de rahi. Agla logical troubleshooting step kya hoga?
options: TV ke IR receiver module/sensor ko check karna (blocked window, faulty receiver IC ya faulty demodulator ho sakta hai)
Remote ki battery ko dobara replace karna
Remote ke tact switches ko dobara solder karna
Bina further check kiye seedhe remote ka encoder IC change kar dena
questions.explanation: Jab remote transmitter side ki sabhi possible faults (battery, LED, switches) exclude ho chuki hain aur signal sahi bheja ja raha hai, to logical agla step TV ke receiving side (IR sensor window, receiver IC, demodulator) ko check karna hai — isliye option A सही है। Battery ya switches ko dobara check karna repetitive hai jab wo already theek confirm ho chuke hain, aur bina further diagnosis ke encoder IC change karna galat approach hai।

questions.question: IR receiver module mein "demodulator IC" ka kaam kya hota hai?
options: IR LED ko current supply karna
Modulated IR signal ko receive karke usme se carrier frequency hata kar original digital data pulses ko decode karna
Tact switch ke contacts ko saaf karna
TV ke main power supply ko control karna
questions.explanation: Demodulator IC photodiode/phototransistor se aaye modulated IR signal ko process karke carrier frequency hata deta hai aur original digital data (jo key-press ko represent karta hai) ko decode karke TV ke microcontroller tak bhejta hai — isliye option B सही है। Ye IR LED (transmitter side ka part) ko current nahi deta, tact switch cleaning se iska koi lena-dena nahi, aur TV ka main power supply control karna iska kaam nahi hai।

questions.question: Remote control ka ek particular button baar-baar dabane par kabhi response deta hai kabhi nahi. Sabse likely cause kya hai?
options: Encoder IC completely dead ho gaya hai
TV ka IR sensor permanently block ho gaya hai
Us particular tact switch ke contacts oxidise ya dirty ho gaye hain jisse intermittent contact ban raha hai
Battery bilkul dead ho gayi hai
questions.explanation: Jab sirf ek particular button ka response inconsistent ho jabki baaki buttons normal kaam kar rahe hon, to sabse likely cause usी switch ke contacts par oxidation/dust ke karan intermittent connection hona hai — isliye option C सही है। Agar encoder IC dead ho ya battery dead ho to sabhi buttons affect honge, aur TV sensor permanently blocked hone par bhi sabhi buttons ka response ruk jayega, sirf ek button nahi।

questions.question: IR aur RF remote control ki comparison mein "examples" ke roop mein sahi jodi kaunsi hai?
options: IR - smart TV ka Bluetooth voice remote; RF - basic ceiling fan ka remote
Dono types hamesha sirf IR technology use karte hain
Dono types hamesha sirf RF technology use karte hain
IR - traditional TV/AC remote; RF - wireless keyboard/mouse aur modern smart TV ke Bluetooth/voice remote
questions.explanation: Traditional TV/AC remotes classically IR par based hote hain, jabki wireless keyboard/mouse aur smart TV ke modern voice/Bluetooth remotes RF technology use karte hain, isliye option D सही example pairing है। Option A ulti jodi banata hai (Bluetooth remote actually RF hai, IR nahi), aur options B/C dono galat generalization hain kyunki practically dono technologies alag-alag use cases mein use hoti hain.

questions.question: Remote control ka encoder IC har key press par IR LED ko kis form mein signal bhejne ke liye drive karta hai?
options: Ek series of modulated pulses (carrier frequency par ON-OFF pattern) jo us particular key ka unique digital code represent karte hain
Ek continuous steady DC current bina kisi pattern ke
Ek analog sine wave audio signal
Ek single fixed voltage jo hamesha same rehta hai chahe koi bhi key dabayi jaye
questions.explanation: Har key ke liye encoder IC ek unique modulated pulse pattern (carrier frequency par ON-OFF sequence) generate karta hai jo IR LED se transmit hota hai aur receiver side par decode hokar sahi key identify hoti hai — isliye option A सही है। Continuous DC current mein koi data encode nahi ho sakta, analog audio sine wave IR remote ka standard nahi hai, aur agar sabhi keys ke liye fixed same voltage ho to receiver alag-alag keys ko differentiate hi nahi kar payega।

questions.question: IR remote control system ke complete signal chain mein components ka sahi order kya hai?
options: IR receiver -> encoder IC -> IR LED -> keypad
Keypad (tact switch) -> encoder IC -> IR LED driver transistor -> IR LED (transmit) -> IR photodiode/receiver -> demodulator IC (decode) -> TV control circuit
Battery -> demodulator IC -> keypad -> TV
IR LED -> keypad -> TV directly, bina kisi receiver ke
questions.explanation: Sahi signal chain hai: keypad se key press detect hoti hai, encoder IC us key ka code generate karta hai, driver transistor IR LED ko drive karta hai jo signal transmit karti hai, phir TV ka photodiode/receiver signal pakadta hai aur demodulator IC use decode karke TV ke control circuit tak bhejta hai — isliye option B सही है। Baaki teeno options mein order ulta ya incomplete/galat hai (jaise receiver pehle rakhna, ya bina receiver ke seedhe TV se connect karna), jo actual working ko sahi tarike se represent nahi karte।
